columns.Name: TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE on FND_TREE

columns.Name: TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to TREE_CODE on FND_TREE.

columns.Name: TREE_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to VERSION_ID on FND_TREE_VERSION

columns.Name: TREE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for tree node.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PARENT_TREE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the tree node that is the parent of this node. If this value is null, this node is the root node of the tree.If there are multiple rows with this value null, then they are all root nodes, effectively forming a forest of disjoint trees.

columns.Name: DATA_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Data Source Id for the Data Source from which this node is coming

columns.Name: PK1_START_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node. For range-based tree nodes, this is the start of the range and PK1_END_VALUE forms the end.

columns.Name: PK2_START_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node. For range-based tree nodes, this is the start of the range and PK1_END_VALUE forms the end.

columns.Name: PK3_START_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node. For range-based tree nodes, this is the start of the range and PK1_END_VALUE forms the end.

columns.Name: PK4_START_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node. For range-based tree nodes, this is the start of the range and PK1_END_VALUE forms the end.

columns.Name: PK5_START_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node. For range-based tree nodes, this is the start of the range and PK1_END_VALUE forms the end.

columns.Name: PK1_END_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the end of the range for range-based tree nodes. If the node is not range based, then this value is null.

columns.Name: PK2_END_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the end of the range for range-based tree nodes. If the node is not range based, then this value is null.

columns.Name: PK3_END_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the end of the range for range-based tree nodes. If the node is not range based, then this value is null.

columns.Name: PK4_END_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the end of the range for range-based tree nodes. If the node is not range based, then this value is null.

columns.Name: PK5_END_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the end of the range for range-based tree nodes. If the node is not range based, then this value is null.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: For tree-in-tree, this is the reference to the tree code. The referenced tree has to belong to the same Tree Structure.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_TREE_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: For tree-in-tree, this is the reference to the tree version. The referenced tree has to belong to the same Tree Structure.

columns.Name: TREE_LABEL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the TREE_LABEL_ID in FND_TREE_LABEL.This identifies the label associated with this tree node.

columns.Name: PARENT_DATA_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Parent data source Id

columns.Name: PARENT_PK1_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column identifies the data source primary key 1.

columns.Name: PARENT_PK2_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column identifies the data source primary key 2.

columns.Name: PARENT_PK3_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column identifies the data source primary key 3.

columns.Name: PARENT_PK4_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column identifies the data source primary key 4.

columns.Name: PARENT_PK5_VALUE
columns.Comments: The column identifies the data source primary key 5.

columns.Name: PARENT_TREE_LABEL_ID
columns.Comments: Tree label Id of the Parent Node

columns.Name: SORT_ORDER
columns.Comments: The sort order of nodes within the tree.

columns.Name: DEPTH
columns.Comments: Depth of this tree node. This is useful for breadth-first traversal of the tree.

columns.Name: CHILD_COUNT
columns.Comments: Number of Children of the Node.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
